meta.title: A Network Sandbox for ICS Malware
meta.description:
David Atch of CyberX on the Stage 2: Technical Deep Dives at S4x18 talks about how they use a specialized ICS Sandbox to safely analyze ICS malware.

If you are familiar with sandboxing, skip to 8:00. There David goes into the features of the ICS Sandbox by looking at some OT malware samples, such as Havex and Industroyer.
